title: Dravidian parties got trapped in vicious cycle of cash-for-votes and corruption, says T.N. Minister Arunraj
description: “The Dravidian parties played a role in making T.N. a social justice State. But their initial idealism became diluted. They got trapped in a narrow path of corruption-ridden governance and family politics to such an extent that they couldn’t come out of it,” says the TVK leader
